name: Brown Bread (Graham)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the cornmeal and flours with baking soda, salt, and currants.
2. In a separate bowl, beat together buttermilk and molasses.
3. Pour the liquid mixture into two well-greased or buttered one-pound coffee cans.
4. Butter two 6-inch squares of foil and tie around the tops of the coffee cans with string.
5. Place the coffee cans on a rack in a closely covered pot.
6. Add 2 inches of water to the pot, weight down the cover for a tight seal, and bring to steam for three hours. Do not open the pot until at least two hours have passed.
7. Let cool for 20 minutes before unmolding.
